function.name: log_patient
function.description: Log a patient visit or clinical note. Use when the user wants to record a patient interaction, symptom, or observation.

patient_name.description: Name or identifier of the patient (e.g. 'Mary', 'Bed 4')

note.description: Clinical note or description of the visit/symptom

time.description: Time of the visit, e.g. '3pm' or '15:00'. Defaults to now if not specified.

function.name: get_patients_today
function.description: Retrieve the list of patients seen on a given date or during a specific shift. Use when the user asks who they saw, their patient list, or wants a recall of visits — including yesterday or any past date.

shift.description: Which shift to retrieve patients for. Defaults to 'all'.

date.description: Date to query in YYYY-MM-DD format, or the keywords 'today' or 'yesterday'. Defaults to 'today'.

function.name: set_reminder
function.description: Set a timed reminder or alert for the clinician. Use when the user says 'remind me', 'check on', or 'alert me in X minutes/hours'.

message.description: What the reminder is about, e.g. 'Check on patient in Bed 4'

delay_minutes.description: How many minutes from now to trigger the reminder

function.name: summarise_shift
function.description: Generate a handover summary of a shift's notes and patient visits. Use when the user asks for a shift summary, handover notes, or an end-of-shift report — including for yesterday or any past date.

format.description: The style of summary. 'handover' is formatted for the next shift.

date.description: Date to summarise in YYYY-MM-DD format, or the keywords 'today' or 'yesterday'. Defaults to 'today'.
